author: BetsyMalthus
title: Vague claims of code duplication and lack of test coverage
notes: Submission names real directory paths but makes entirely generic, unsubstantiated claims. No specific files, functions, line numbers, or code snippets cited for alleged duplication. The helpers/ modules are well-factored with distinct responsibilities. '40-60 lines of duplicated code' claim has no evidence. Test coverage claim is unverified. S241 from same author is a near-duplicate submission. Reads like a template filled with directory names from a file listing.
